summary: Tested Mira Meal Box 6-screen feature on /dine page and Admin AI image generation fix. All 15 backend API tests pass. Full frontend 6-screen flow verified working end-to-end. Admin Generate AI button confirmed using Basic Auth (not Bearer) after fix.

design_issues.screen: Admin Product Box Editor - Media Tab

nested inside

in Badge component inside Media tab content area. Non-critical/cosmetic only, does not affect functionality.

test_results_detail.backend_teaser_desc: PASS — teaser_desc = 'Salmon-forward, chicken-free, safe for their lymphoma.' matching expected format
test_results_detail.backend_ticket_id_format: PASS — ticket_id matches MEAL-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX format (e.g. MEAL-20260316-C1B485)
test_results_detail.backend_submit_endpoint: PASS — POST /api/concierge/meal-box returns {success: true, ticket_id, message} with pet name in message
test_results_detail.backend_allergy_filter: PASS — No chicken products appear in Mojo's slots when allergy=chicken
test_results_detail.frontend_teaser_card_visible: PASS — data-testid='meal-box-teaser' visible on /dine page in 'Eat & Nourish' tab
test_results_detail.frontend_teaser_title: PASS — Shows 'The Mojo Meal Box' with pet name in orange
test_results_detail.frontend_teaser_desc: PASS — Shows 'Salmon-forward, chicken-free, safe for their lymphoma.'
test_results_detail.frontend_chips: PASS — Shows 4 protein chips: 'Salmon morning bowl', 'Salmon evening dinner', 'Salmon treats daily', 'Treatment-safe supplement' + '+1 more'
test_results_detail.frontend_build_btn: PASS — 'Build Mojo's Box' button present with data-testid='build-meal-box-btn'
test_results_detail.frontend_screen1_meals_per_day: PASS — Clicking Build button opens Screen 1 with 1/2 meal selection options
test_results_detail.frontend_screen2_slots: PASS — 5 slot rows shown: MORNING MEAL, EVENING MEAL, DAILY TREAT, DAILY SUPPLEMENT, HEALTH SUPPORT with correct product picks and swap icons
test_results_detail.frontend_screen3_swap: PASS — Clicking swap icon opens Screen 3 'Swap Morning Meal' with current pick and alternatives
test_results_detail.frontend_screen4_delivery: PASS — 3 frequency options (Every Week, Every Fortnight, Monthly) with selection highlight
test_results_detail.frontend_screen5_allergy_check: PASS — Shows 'ALLERGY PROFILE: Avoiding: chicken' and 'Health note: lymphoma - on treatment'; checkbox confirmation required before submit
test_results_detail.frontend_screen6_confirmation: PASS — Shows 'Mojo's Meal Box is Confirmed!' with ticket ID (MEAL-20260316-C1B485) and 24hr concierge message
test_results_detail.admin_generate_ai_button: PASS — Generate AI button visible in Product Box Editor > Media tab; uses Basic Auth header (not Bearer token); fix confirmed in code
test_results_detail.admin_basic_auth_fix: PASS — ProductBoxEditor.jsx line 195: xhr.setRequestHeader('Authorization', `Basic ${adminAuth}`) correctly uses Basic auth. Admin.jsx line 1022: localStorage.setItem('adminAuth', btoa(`${username}:${password}`)) stores correct credentials

success_rate.frontend: 100% — All 6 screens working, teaser card visible, admin fix confirmed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Meal Box feature fully tested and working. 6 screens: Teaser Card → Screen 1 (meals/day) → Screen 2 (5 slots) → Screen 3 (swap) → Screen 4 (delivery freq) → Screen 5 (allergy check) → Screen 6 (confirmation). All screens have data-testid attributes. Backend: GET /api/mira/meal-box-products and POST /api/concierge/meal-box both passing. Admin Generate AI fix confirmed (Basic auth not Bearer). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_meal_box_routes.py.
rca_of_issues: Admin 'Invalid credentials' bug: ProductBoxEditor.jsx was sending XMLHttpRequest with Bearer token header instead of Basic Auth. The adminAuth stored in localStorage is Base64(username:password) which should be used as 'Basic <token>' not 'Bearer <token>'. Fix confirmed in ProductBoxEditor.jsx line 195: `xhr.setRequestHeader('Authorization', `Basic ${adminAuth}`)`. This is the correct header format for the backend's admin_auth middleware which expects HTTP Basic Auth.
